title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: The Missing
subTitle: When rancher and single mother of two Maggie Gilkeson (Cate Blanchett) sees her teenage daughter, Lily (Evan Rachel Wood), kidnapped by Apache rebels, she reluctantly accepts the help of her estranged father, Samuel (Tommy Lee Jones), in tracking down the kidnappers. Along the way, the two must learn to reconcile the past and work together if they are going to have any hope of getting Lily back before she is taken over the border and forced to become a prostitute.

title: The Adventures of Tintin
subTitle: Tintin's new model ship sparks an adventure of intrigue and theft. He uncovers a historical mystery involving treasure, rival groups and a quest for scrolls revealing a sunken ship's location.

title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
subTitle: Peter Parker tries to stop the Vulture from selling weapons made with advanced Chitauri technology while trying to balance his life as an ordinary high school student.

title: Faster
subTitle: After completing his sentence, a former convict sets out to avenge his brother's murder. As he blazes a trail of violence and vengeance, he is pursued by two police officers and an assassin.

title: Afraid
subTitle: Curtis and his family are asked to install an artificial intelligence program in their house in a bid to test it. However, they soon begin to experience disturbing occurrences.

title: Morbius
subTitle: Determined to cure the disease that has plagued him his entire life, Morbius conducts a drastic experiment, which bears unforeseen consequences.

title: Blade Runner 2049
subTitle: K, an officer with the Los Angeles Police Department, unearths a secret that could create chaos. He goes in search of a former Blade Runner who has been missing for over three decades.

title: Brightburn
subTitle: Tori and Kyle find a baby boy in a spaceship and adopt him as their own child, Brandon. However, after turning 12, Brandon learns that he has superpowers and begins to use them for sinister purposes.

title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
subTitle: The Angels track down rings containing the names of those in the FBI's witness protection programme. However, the witnesses begin to get murdered one by one.

title: Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines
subTitle: John Connor, a cybernetic warrior from the future, travels back in time to accomplish his mission of protecting a man and his future wife, Kate, from a robotic attack.

title: Ghost Rider
subTitle: Motorcycle stuntman Johnny Blaze gives up his soul to save his father and becomes the Ghost Rider to fight against Blackheart, the son of Mephistopheles, the devil himself.

title: Hancock
subTitle: A hard-living superhero who has fallen out of favor with the public enters into a questionable relationship with the wife of the public relations professional who's trying to repair his image.

title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
subTitle: Peter Parker, the beloved superhero Spider-Man, faces four destructive elemental monsters while on holiday in Europe. Soon, he receives help from Mysterio, a fellow hero with mysterious origins.

title: My Tiny Senpai
subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Radiant

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Hellboy
subTitle: Hellboy is a demonic warrior who protects the Earth from paranormal threats. When an enemy from his past makes a comeback, it is up to him and his team to stop the villain once and for all.

title: A-X-L
subTitle: Miles befriends A-X-L, a robotic dog, when he manages to activate its owner-pairing technology. However, Miles's life takes an unusual turn when A-X-L's creators come searching for it.

title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
subTitle: A diligent scientist invents an innovative machine that drops food from the sky to help his fellow residents. Chaos ensues when the machine becomes uncontrollable.

title: Terminator Salvation
subTitle: Judgement Day has occurred and skynet has all but exterminated modern society. Now John Connor leads the resistance against skynet but is unsure of victory until he encounters Marcus Wright.

title: Armored
subTitle: Ty Hackett takes up a job in the same company where his father worked before he died. His mentor Mike convinces him to be a part of the robbery of two armoured trucks, but their plan goes haywire.

title: The Man From Toronto
subTitle: A struggling entrepreneur plans a surprise for his wife's birthday, but due to a twist of fate, he gets caught in the middle of an operation to apprehend an assassin.

title: Salt
subTitle: CIA agent Evelyn Salt's life takes an ugly turn when she is accused of planning the assassination of the Russian president. However, she flees and sets out to prove her innocence.

title: The Cable Guy
subTitle: Chip, a cable technician, sets his sights on befriending Steven, a new customer whom he takes a fancy to. But when Steven spurns their friendship, Chip immediately starts to wreak havoc in his life.

title: Baby Driver
subTitle: When talented getaway driver Baby meets his dream girl, Debora, he chooses to leave his shady life behind. But when he is called in for one last heist with an unstable crew, things get dicey.

title: The Karate Kid
subTitle: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

title: Anaconda
subTitle: A documentary crew, who are on a mission to find a tribe named Shirishamas, help a snake hunter when they find him stranded. However, he forces them to risk their lives and hunt down an anaconda.

title: The Pope's Exorcist
subTitle: Father Gabriele Amorth, an exorcist, uncovers a hidden conspiracy as he investigates the horrifying possession of a young boy.

title: Men in Black: International
subTitle: Agent M, a probationary member of the MIB, teams up with Agent H and uncovers a sinister plot that reveals a traitor in the organisation aiding an alien invasion.

title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
subTitle: Eddie Brock tries to revive his failing career by interviewing a serial killer, Cletus Kasady, who is on death row. When Carnage gains control over Cletus's body, he escapes from the prison.

title: My Tiny Senpai
subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Battle: Los Angeles
subTitle: Michael Nantz, a Marine staff sergeant, renders his services again, soon after his retirement. He and his platoon have to save the city of Los Angeles from alien invaders.

title: When a Stranger Calls
subTitle: During a babysitting job, Jill, a young woman, is terrorised by a psychopathic killer's ominous calls. Years later, he returns to menace her once again.

title: Kill 'Em All 2
subTitle: Partnered by the CIA, Phillip and Vanessa return to Europe, facing a vengeful Russian-French terrorist Vlad, who wants to settle the score for his dead brother.

title: Charlie's Angels
subTitle: A team of female private agents, popularly known as Charlie's Angels, are tasked by their mysterious boss to expose an international conspiracy to weaponise an energy conservation device.

title: XXX
subTitle: The US government recruits extreme sports athlete Xander Cage to infiltrate a Russian criminal ring, which is plotting the destruction of the world.

title: Life
subTitle: As astronauts discover the first evidence of extra-terrestrial life on Mars, they begin realising that the life form is extremely intelligent and hostile.

title: Uncharted
subTitle: Recruited by Victor, street-smart Nathan steps into a race for the lost treasure of Ferdinand Magellan. However, a corrupt billionaire and an evil mercenary also have the same goal.

title: Drunken Master
subTitle: Wong, a mischievous young boy, learns a special form of martial arts from his alcoholic master in order to prevent an assassin from executing his goals.

title: 2 Guns
subTitle: Two undercover agents, Robert and Michael, aim to expose Manny 'Papi' Greco, a drug lord. Unaware of each other's true identities, the two get into trouble when they finally meet Papi.

title: Jumanji: The Next Level
subTitle: After Spencer goes missing, his team of confidantes comes back to Jumanji to go to the undiscovered regions and support him in escaping the world's most lethal game.

title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
subTitle: Ben and Zoey find themselves trapped in a series of deadly escape rooms with four others. They try to survive and find a way out as they slowly discover that they have played the game before.

subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.
